{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad rally across held names with multiple positions in the green (HAL, NAVINFLUOR, GRSE, CAMS, ABCAPITAL, COFORGE, MARICO, ADANIPORTS, TITAGARH all up materially). Cumulative experiment P&L is -53.72% — capital preservation is paramount. Most SLs are still at or below entry while positions are showing 1-9% gains; trailing SLs to lock in gains is the priority action this tick. Market data feed shows zeros on indices (likely stale snapshot) so I'm relying on individual stock prints.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24500,
      "nifty_resistance": 25200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",

      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1056.70 (+7.4% from entry 984). Current SL 1035 already locks in ~5% gain. Bullish thesis intact (Q4 PAT +19%, GNPA 0.93%, MOFSL Buy). SL at 1035 sits ~2.1% below CMP — appropriate trail gap. No change to SL/target — emitting HOLD-equivalent. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +7.4%, SL 1035 already above entry locking gain, ~2.1% below CMP — proper trail gap. Target 1110 still ~5% upside. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 124.12 vs entry 125.10 (-0.8%). MACD bearish crossover, but SL 121 = -3.3% absorbs noise. Defensive hedge against book concentration in financials/cap goods. Hold; if breaks 121 SL fires automatically."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",

      "new_target": 1820.00,

      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1757.10 (+3.4% from 1700). Current SL 1735 already at +2% locking gain, ~1.3% below CMP. Promoter sale flag (Capital Group block deal) is mild distribution concern; no SL move needed. Hold via no-op MODIFY would be wasted — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.4% gain, SL 1735 locks +2% above entry with 1.3% gap to CMP — within trail tolerance. Promoter block-deal at ATH is yellow flag — let SL manage downside; do not loosen."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4540.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 4630.40 (+1.2% from 4575). Current SL 4530 (~-1% below entry). Tightening to 4540 keeps SL just below entry breakeven cushion while maintaining 2% gap to CMP. Sector strong (new CMD catalyst, defence orders). Trail gap discipline: 4540 vs CMP 4630 = 1.95% — within 1% floor."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 7049 (+2.2% from 6900). SL 6960 already above entry — locks gain. Gap to CMP 1.26% — within 1% floor. Q4 PAT +114%, EBITDA margin 34%, Chemours commissioning June/July catalyst. No-op MODIFY — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.2% gain, SL 6960 already locks +0.9% above entry. Trail gap 1.26% to CMP — within tolerance. Hold; let target 7400 work."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",

    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",

    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",

      "product": "CNC",

    },
    {

      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1279.10 (+1.6% from 1259). SL 1260 already at +1 above entry. Gap to CMP 1.49% — within tolerance. No-op — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {

      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",

    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 3034 (+0.30% from 3025). SL 3000 = -0.83% below entry, 1.12% below CMP. Q4 results delivered (revenue +29%, PAT +24%). Hold at current SL — already tight, within trail-gap discipline."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 807.30 (+0.16% from 806). SL 798 = -1% below entry, 1.15% below CMP. Q4 highest-ever revenue, PAT +11% YoY, dividend Rs 4 declared. SL already at sensible trail gap. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [

    },
    {

      "new_stop_loss": null,

    },
    {

  "watchlist_notes": "BAJAJ-AUTO (buyback at 16% premium) and POLYCAB (Q4 +27% rev) remain attractive but adding now would push deployed % materially above current levels and stack into already-crowded book. CHENNPETRO/HINDPETRO OMC theme attractive but cluster discipline says skip. CHOLAHLDNG has board meeting tomorrow (May 8) — binary-event rule prohibits new full-size entry within 3 sessions; pass. SRF would stack chemicals cluster on top of NAVINFLUOR — pass. DABUR/AUROPHARMA/M&M/MRF added to watch but no entry triggers today.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is heavily deployed across 11 CNC positions with broad sector spread (financials, capital goods/defence, IT, FMCG, chemicals, services, gold ETF). Cumulative experiment P&L -53.72% — capital preservation dominates. Today's tape is favorable; nearly all positions in green. Action focus this tick: (1) HAL SL trail to 4540, (2) hold all others — most SLs already at tight trail gaps within 1-2% of CMP. No new entries: 11 positions is enough breadth, and the open HFCL MIS LIMIT @ 133.50 has been sitting 33+ hours stale (placed 2008m ago) — should be cancelled in a future tick if still open at next call. NO new BUYs to avoid cluster stacking and to respect capital-preservation priority given -53.72% drawdown."
}
